title: Project scaffold + foundation types
description: Create project scaffold: package.json, tsconfig.json, biome.json, src/index.ts (entry point + VERSION), src/types.ts (ALL shared types/interfaces from spec), src/errors.ts (SaplingError hierarchy), src/config.ts (config loader + defaults), src/json.ts (JSON envelope helpers), src/logging/logger.ts + color.ts, src/test-helpers.ts. Verify quality gates pass (bun test, biome check, tsc --noEmit). File area: root config files + src/types.ts, src/errors.ts, src/config.ts, src/json.ts, src/logging/*, src/test-helpers.ts
closeReason: Project scaffold complete: 14 files (package.json, tsconfig.json, biome.json, bun.lock + 10 src/ files). All foundation types, errors, config, JSON helpers, logging, and test helpers implemented per spec. 14 tests passing, lint and typecheck clean.

title: Tool system - 6 tools + registry
description: Implement all 6 tools (bash, read, write, edit, grep, glob) + tool registry + dispatch. Each tool implements Tool interface with execute() and toDefinition(). Tests colocated using real filesystem (temp dirs). ~800 lines estimated. File area: src/tools/*
closeReason: Implemented complete tool system: 6 tools (bash, read, write, edit, grep, glob) + ToolRegistry + dispatch. 23 files, 1562 lines, 50 tests all passing. Quality gates clean (tests, lint, typecheck). Commit b638726 on branch overstory/tools-builder/sapling-e469.

title: LLM client - CC subprocess + Anthropic SDK backends
description: Implement LlmClient interface with two backends: 1) CC subprocess (primary, subscription billing) using claude -p with --tools '' --max-turns 1 --output-format json --json-schema, 2) Raw Anthropic SDK (secondary, API billing) using @anthropic-ai/sdk. Both return LlmResponse with content blocks + usage. Include token estimation. ~400 lines estimated. File area: src/client/*
closeReason: Implemented LlmClient interface with CC subprocess backend (CcClient) and Anthropic SDK backend (AnthropicClient). Both implement estimateTokens, return LlmResponse with content blocks + TokenUsage. CC backend uses claude -p with --tools '' --max-turns 1 --output-format json --json-schema. Anthropic backend uses @anthropic-ai/sdk with DI for testability. 50 tests, all gates passing.

title: Context manager - measure/score/prune/archive/reshape pipeline
description: Implement the core context management pipeline: measure.ts (token counting + budget tracking), score.ts (relevance scoring per message with recency/file-overlap/error-context/decision/size signals), prune.ts (pruning strategies for tool results and assistant messages), archive.ts (working memory with workSummary/decisions/modifiedFiles/resolvedErrors), reshape.ts (rebuild messages array), manager.ts (orchestrates pipeline). Tests for each stage. ~800 lines estimated. File area: src/context/*
closeReason: Context manager pipeline implemented: measure (token counting + budget), score (5-signal relevance), prune (bash truncation, stale reads, summarization, score-based), archive (working memory), reshape (message array rebuild), manager (orchestrator). 18 files, 2657 lines, 67 tests passing, lint+typecheck clean.

title: Agent loop + CLI integration
description: Implement the agent turn loop (src/loop.ts): LLM call -> tool dispatch -> context management -> repeat. Parallel tool execution via Promise.all. Stop conditions (no tool calls, max turns, unrecoverable). Error handling with exponential backoff. Wire CLI commands in src/index.ts via Commander.js (sapling run, sapling version). ~300 lines + CLI wiring. Depends on scaffold, tools, client, and context manager. File area: src/loop.ts, src/loop.test.ts, CLI parts of src/index.ts, agents/*.md
closeReason: Implemented agent turn loop (src/loop.ts) with parallel tool execution via Promise.all, all stop conditions (task_complete, max_turns, error), exponential backoff retry for LLM errors, and context manager integration. Created CLI entry point (src/index.ts) with Commander.js supporting all flags (--model, --cwd, --backend, --system-prompt-file, --max-turns, --verbose, --json, --quiet). CLI run handler (src/cli.ts) with stub factories marked for merge-time integration. Agent definitions (agents/builder.md, scout.md, reviewer.md). 13 tests passing, lint clean, typecheck clean.

title: Integration verification and cross-module wiring
description: All 5 Sapling MVP components were built in parallel worktrees and merged to main via auto-resolve. Need to: 1) Run bun install to get dependencies. 2) Run quality gates (bun test, biome check, tsc --noEmit). 3) Fix any import mismatches between modules — each component built its own scaffold stubs. Key files to check: src/types.ts vs src/tools/types.ts vs src/client/types.ts, src/errors.ts imports across all modules, src/index.ts CLI wiring to src/cli.ts and src/loop.ts. 4) Wire the CLI run command to the real loop + client + tools + context manager. 5) All quality gates must pass.
closeReason: Integration verification complete. Consolidated duplicate types into canonical src/types.ts, replaced stubs with real wiring (AnthropicClient, CcClient, createDefaultRegistry, createContextManager), wired CLI run command, added mock test helpers. 164 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.

title: Integration v2: fix cross-module types and wiring on merged main
description: The Sapling MVP was built by 5 parallel leads and all merged to main. An integration pass was done but its branch could not merge due to conflicts. Need to redo integration on current main: 1) bun install. 2) tsc --noEmit to find type errors. 3) Fix all cross-module import/type mismatches. Key issues to expect: missing types in src/types.ts (LlmBackend, SaplingConfig, ContextBudget, BudgetUtilization, ContextArchive, ContextManager, Tool, ToolRegistry interface, ToolResult, ScoredMessage, MessageCategory, RunOptions), duplicate types in src/client/types.ts and src/tools/types.ts (should re-export from canonical src/types.ts), ToolRegistry.definitions() should be renamed to toDefinitions(), test helpers need mock client helpers, src/cli.ts has TODO stubs that need real wiring, src/index.ts run command needs real CLI handler. Reference the failed integration branch overstory/integration-builder/sapling-11b1 for what changes were needed. All quality gates must pass: bun test, biome check src/, tsc --noEmit.
closeReason: Integration v2 complete: consolidated 13 types into src/types.ts, replaced duplicate type defs in client/types.ts and tools/types.ts with re-exports, wired real client/tool/context modules in cli.ts, implemented run command in index.ts, added test helpers. All quality gates pass (164 tests, clean lint, zero type errors).
